prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult Japanese woman sitting in the blue plastic seats of a modern soccer stadium, close to the pitch, looking directly at the camera with a soft confident smile. She has shoulder-length straight black bob with a side part, smooth fair skin, natural makeup, and a polished idol-like appearance. She wears Argentina national team sky-blue and white striped cropped jersey with a visible AFA-style crest, three shoulder stripes, and the number 10 printed large on the front, paired with a light blue pleated mini skirt. Compose her seated three-quarter view in the foreground, one hand resting on her thigh and the other on the seat, with rows of empty and occupied blue stadium seats receding behind her, a green soccer field visible to the left, railings, distant spectators in matching blue-and-white outfits, and a large covered stadium roof with steel beams overhead. Use bright natural daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, crisp facial detail, wide-angle smartphone-like perspective, vibrant sky-blue tones, and high-end editorial sports-fan photography style. Avoid text overlays, watermarks, extra logos beyond the jersey crest and number, distorted hands, or unrealistic anatomy.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult Japanese woman sitting in the blue plastic seats of a modern soccer stadium, close to the pitch, looking directly at the camera with a soft confident smile. She has shoulder-length straight black bob with a side part, smooth fair skin, natural makeup, and a polished idol-like appearance. She wears Argentina national team sky-blue and white striped cropped jersey with a visible AFA-style crest, three shoulder stripes, and the number 10 printed large on the front, paired with a light blue pleated mini skirt. Compose her seated three-quarter view in the foreground, one hand resting on her thigh and the other on the seat, with rows of empty and occupied blue stadium seats receding behind her, a green soccer field visible to the left, railings, distant spectators in matching blue-and-white outfits, and a large covered stadium roof with steel beams overhead. Use bright natural daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, crisp facial detail, wide-angle smartphone-like perspective, vibrant sky-blue tones, and high-end editorial sports-fan photography style. Avoid text overlays, watermarks, extra logos beyond the jersey crest and number, distorted hands, or unrealistic anatomy.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级写实的竖构图人像，主角为一名坐在现代足球场蓝色塑料座椅上的成年日本女性，位置靠近球场，她正视镜头，带着自信而柔和的微笑。她留着 及肩直发黑色波波头，侧分刘海，皮肤白皙细腻，妆容自然，外形精致如偶像。她身穿 阿根廷国家队天蓝色与白色条纹短款球衣，胸前可见明显的 AFA 风格队徽、三条肩带以及醒目的 10 号印花，搭配 浅蓝色百褶迷你裙。构图采用前景四分之三侧身坐姿，一只手放在大腿上，另一只手放在座椅上；背景是层层叠叠的空置与已占用的蓝色看台座椅，左侧可见绿色足球场、栏杆、远处身着蓝白配色服装的观众，以及上方带有钢梁的巨大体育场顶棚。采用明亮的自然光，浅景深，真实的织物纹理，清晰的面部细节，广角智能手机视角，鲜艳的天蓝色调，以及高端体育迷专题摄影风格。避免出现文字叠加、水印、除球衣队徽和号码外的额外标志、手部畸形或不符合人体解剖学的结构。
